subcodes.title: Words spoken at Dodge home in New York, 1912-04-16
subcodes.first_line: In those places where they have no Mashrak-el-Azkar they rent a house and call it by that name
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @differences in human capacity, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @unity; oneness of humanity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion
